title: Glaze — New Product Launch
subtitle: Growth & Launch Campaign | 2023

paragraphs: Multi-product launch framework combining Instagram and TikTok growth strategy, B2B partnership development, and event amplification. A scalable campaign structure designed for consumer product launches across categories.
bullets: Developed phased launch strategy: pre-launch teaser on TikTok → launch week Instagram takeover → B2B partnership seeding → event amplification
Built launch timeline and social media content calendar aligned with product milestones
Designed B2B partnership outreach framework for distribution and co-marketing
Created social media growth strategy targeting early adopters and brand advocates
Developed event amplification plan to convert early adopters into brand ambassadors
Established KPI dashboard for launch performance measurement

campaign.name: Glaze New Product Launch
campaign.objective: Build rapid brand awareness and early adopter community for a new consumer product with a scalable multi-channel launch framework
campaign.target_audience: Early adopters, trend-conscious consumers, social media-engaged demographic
campaign.insight: A phased launch (tease → launch → partner → amplify) creates compounding momentum — each phase feeds the next, turning early adopters into brand ambassadors
strategy: Pre-launch TikTok teaser content to build anticipation
Launch week Instagram takeover for product reveal
B2B partnership seeding for distribution and co-marketing
Event amplification to convert early adopters into brand ambassadors
KPI dashboard for cross-channel performance tracking

design.layout: Launch campaign case study with timeline

summary: Glaze new product launch campaign — scalable multi-phase framework (TikTok teaser → Instagram launch → B2B seeding → event amplification) with KPI dashboard for consumer product launches.
